prompt: I want post-deploy health checks for our axum service before it promotes to prod. Repo is at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/axum-app. Idempotent please — they'll run against the live env.

assertions.text: The proposed checks are explicitly idempotent — no side-effectful POSTs that mutate prod data without cleanup
Output is in Rust (uses reqwest/cargo test or an equivalent Rust-native runner), not a script in another language
Distinguishes liveness/readiness from deeper route checks so the suite stays meaningful against a real deployed env
